name: part_005

scenes.description: MC section with Kobo Kanaeru, Vestia Zeta, and Kaela Kovalskia.

subtitles.original: Untung lagu nyasantai...
subtitles.english: Good thing the song was chill...

subtitles.original: ...easy listening, jadi kita sambil keliling-keliling kan...
subtitles.english: ...easy listening, so we could walk around...

subtitles.original: ...nyapa fans gitu ya.
subtitles.english: ...greeting the fans like that.

subtitles.original: Asyik banget ya tadi ya?
subtitles.english: It was really fun earlier, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: Aku juga suka banget tadi pas bagian reff-nya ya.
subtitles.english: I also really liked the chorus part earlier.

subtitles.original: Da la da la da la da la da la...
subtitles.english: Da la da la da la da la da la...

subtitles.original: Itu... itu beda lagu nggak sih?
subtitles.english: That... that's a different song, isn't it?

subtitles.original: Da la da la da la da la da la...
subtitles.english: Da la da la da la da la da la...

subtitles.original: Nggak gitu deh.
subtitles.english: It's not like that.

subtitles.original: Ya tapi pokoknya asyik lah ya kalau nyanyi lagu chill santai-santai kayak gini.
subtitles.english: Yeah, but anyway, it's fun to sing a chill and relaxed song like this.

subtitles.original: Iya, santai dong.
subtitles.english: Yeah, chill of course.

subtitles.original: Tapi ngomongin soal santai, kita tuh sebenarnya belum bisa santai dulu.
subtitles.english: But speaking of chill, we actually can't chill just yet.

subtitles.original: Hei, santai...
subtitles.english: Hey, chill...

subtitles.original: Karena kayaknya katanya nggak boleh santai-santai.
subtitles.english: Because it seems like we're not allowed to be too chill.

subtitles.original: Iya iya iya, jangan santai-santai. Jangan terlalu santai.
subtitles.english: Yeah yeah yeah, don't be chill. Don't be too chill.

subtitles.original: Karena konser nya tuh masih panjang.
subtitles.english: Because the concert is still long.

subtitles.original: Jadi sebelum itu, kalian ada nggak yang mau kalian sampaiin dulu?
subtitles.english: So before that, do you guys have anything you want to say first?

subtitles.original: Mulai dari ini nih, yang nggak bisa diem.
subtitles.english: Starting from this one, who can't stay still.

subtitles.original: Tiga kata saja.
subtitles.english: Just three words.

subtitles.original: I love you.
subtitles.english: I love you.

subtitles.original: Keren. The best.
subtitles.english: Cool. The best.

subtitles.original: Sangat jelas ya. Tetap semangat...
subtitles.english: Very clear. Stay spirited...

subtitles.original: Tetap semangat menjalani hidup ya. Udah gitu aja.
subtitles.english: Stay spirited in living your life. That's it.

subtitles.original: Pokoknya sampai akhir masih panjang. Semangat!
subtitles.english: Anyway, it's still long until the end. Spirit!

subtitles.original: Saranghaeyo!
subtitles.english: I love you!

subtitles.original: Gomawoyo!
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: Oke kalau aku, ya, semangat selalu.
subtitles.english: Okay as for me, yeah, always stay spirited.

subtitles.original: Semangat santai!
subtitles.english: Spirited chill!

subtitles.original: Hidup jangan terlalu dibawa serius.
subtitles.english: Don't take life too seriously.

subtitles.original: Semangat santai ya! Semangat santai apa tuh?
subtitles.english: Stay spirited chill! What's spirited chill?

subtitles.original: Oke kalau gitu kita lanjutkan ke...
subtitles.english: Okay then, let's continue to...

subtitles.original: Wait wait wait tunggu dulu!
subtitles.english: Wait wait wait hold on!

subtitles.original: Sebelum selesai-selesai ini nih ya...
subtitles.english: Before we finish this up...

subtitles.original: ...kita teriak bareng-bareng penonton dulu nggak sih?
subtitles.english: ...shouldn't we shout together with the audience first?

subtitles.original: Iya dong! Ayo ayo ayo!
subtitles.english: Of course! Let's go let's go let's go!

subtitles.original: Jadi kita teriak bareng ya.
subtitles.english: So we'll shout together.

subtitles.original: Dalam hitungan tiga, kita sama-sama teriak...
subtitles.english: On the count of three, we'll all shout...

subtitles.original: ...'Chromatic Future'. Oke ya!
subtitles.english: ...'Chromatic Future'. Okay!

subtitles.original: Oke oke. 'Chromatic Future' gitu kan ya?
subtitles.english: Okay okay. 'Chromatic Future' like that, right?

subtitles.original: Iya iya kayak gitu.
subtitles.english: Yeah yeah, like that.

subtitles.original: Oke langsung ya. Sambil lihat sini sini sini...
subtitles.english: Okay, right now. While looking here here here...

subtitles.original: Aku ya, aku yang penonton ini nih. Penonton sini nih.
subtitles.english: Me, I'll take this audience. This audience here.

subtitles.original: Aku ini deh, yang tengah yang tengah. Halo!
subtitles.english: I'll take this one, the center one. Hello!

subtitles.original: Oke bareng-bareng ya. Satu, dua, tiga!
subtitles.english: Okay, together now. One, two, three!

subtitles.original: CHROMATIC FUTURE!
subtitles.english: CHROMATIC FUTURE!
